# Conformance corpus: representative RESP commands plus a few
# memcached ASCII commands. Each line decodes to one wire frame
# via `decode_command` (see crates/dynomited/tests/differential.rs).
# Empty lines and `#`-prefixed lines are ignored. The corpus
# pins both the parser surface and the differential rig's
# command sequencing; new entries should be appended, not
# inserted.
#
# --- Redis simple SET/GET round-trips ---
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk01\r\n$3\r\nv01\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk01\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk02\r\n$3\r\nv02\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk02\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk03\r\n$3\r\nv03\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk03\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n$3\r\nv04\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk05\r\n$3\r\nv05\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk05\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk06\r\n$3\r\nv06\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk06\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk07\r\n$3\r\nv07\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk07\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk08\r\n$3\r\nv08\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk08\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk09\r\n$3\r\nv09\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk09\r\n
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nk10\r\n$3\r\nv10\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nk10\r\n
# --- DEL / EXISTS ---
*2\r\n$3\r\nDEL\r\n$3\r\nk01\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nDEL\r\n$3\r\nk02\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nDEL\r\n$3\r\nk03\r\n
*2\r\n$6\r\nEXISTS\r\n$3\r\nk01\r\n
*2\r\n$6\r\nEXISTS\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n
*2\r\n$6\r\nEXISTS\r\n$3\r\nk05\r\n
# --- INCR / DECR ---
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$1\r\nn\r\n$2\r\n10\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nINCR\r\n$1\r\nn\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nINCR\r\n$1\r\nn\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nDECR\r\n$1\r\nn\r\n
*3\r\n$6\r\nINCRBY\r\n$1\r\nn\r\n$1\r\n5\r\n
*3\r\n$6\r\nDECRBY\r\n$1\r\nn\r\n$1\r\n3\r\n
# --- MGET / MSET ---
*5\r\n$4\r\nMSET\r\n$1\r\nx\r\n$1\r\n1\r\n$1\r\ny\r\n$1\r\n2\r\n
*3\r\n$4\r\nMGET\r\n$1\r\nx\r\n$1\r\ny\r\n
*4\r\n$4\r\nMGET\r\n$1\r\nx\r\n$1\r\ny\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n
# --- HASH ---
*4\r\n$4\r\nHSET\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n$2\r\nf1\r\n$2\r\nv1\r\n
*4\r\n$4\r\nHSET\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n$2\r\nf2\r\n$2\r\nv2\r\n
*3\r\n$4\r\nHGET\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n$2\r\nf1\r\n
*3\r\n$4\r\nHGET\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n$2\r\nf2\r\n
*3\r\n$4\r\nHDEL\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n$2\r\nf1\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nHLEN\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n
*2\r\n$7\r\nHGETALL\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n
*2\r\n$5\r\nHKEYS\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n
*2\r\n$5\r\nHVALS\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n
*4\r\n$7\r\nHINCRBY\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n$2\r\nf3\r\n$2\r\n10\r\n
*3\r\n$7\r\nHEXISTS\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n$2\r\nf3\r\n
# --- SET datatype ---
*4\r\n$4\r\nSADD\r\n$1\r\ns\r\n$1\r\na\r\n$1\r\nb\r\n
*4\r\n$4\r\nSADD\r\n$1\r\ns\r\n$1\r\nc\r\n$1\r\nd\r\n
*2\r\n$8\r\nSMEMBERS\r\n$1\r\ns\r\n
*3\r\n$4\r\nSREM\r\n$1\r\ns\r\n$1\r\na\r\n
*2\r\n$5\r\nSCARD\r\n$1\r\ns\r\n
*3\r\n$9\r\nSISMEMBER\r\n$1\r\ns\r\n$1\r\nb\r\n
# --- ZSET ---
*6\r\n$4\r\nZADD\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n$1\r\n1\r\n$1\r\na\r\n$1\r\n2\r\n$1\r\nb\r\n
*4\r\n$4\r\nZADD\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n$1\r\n3\r\n$1\r\nc\r\n
*4\r\n$6\r\nZRANGE\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n$1\r\n0\r\n$2\r\n-1\r\n
*4\r\n$9\r\nZRANGEBYSCORE\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n$1\r\n0\r\n$1\r\n5\r\n
*3\r\n$4\r\nZREM\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n$1\r\nb\r\n
*2\r\n$5\r\nZCARD\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n
# --- Strings / generic ---
*3\r\n$6\r\nAPPEND\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n$5\r\n-tail\r\n
*2\r\n$6\r\nSTRLEN\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n
*3\r\n$6\r\nSETNX\r\n$3\r\nk20\r\n$1\r\nv\r\n
*4\r\n$5\r\nSETEX\r\n$3\r\nk21\r\n$2\r\n60\r\n$1\r\nv\r\n
*3\r\n$6\r\nGETSET\r\n$3\r\nk21\r\n$2\r\nv2\r\n
# --- TTL family ---
*3\r\n$6\r\nEXPIRE\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n$2\r\n60\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nTTL\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nPTTL\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n
*2\r\n$7\r\nPERSIST\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n
# --- Type / debugging ---
*2\r\n$4\r\nTYPE\r\n$3\r\nk04\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nTYPE\r\n$1\r\nh\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nTYPE\r\n$1\r\nz\r\n
# --- Lists ---
*3\r\n$5\r\nRPUSH\r\n$1\r\nl\r\n$1\r\nA\r\n
*3\r\n$5\r\nLPUSH\r\n$1\r\nl\r\n$1\r\nB\r\n
*4\r\n$6\r\nLRANGE\r\n$1\r\nl\r\n$1\r\n0\r\n$2\r\n-1\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nLLEN\r\n$1\r\nl\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nLPOP\r\n$1\r\nl\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nRPOP\r\n$1\r\nl\r\n
# --- Bitops / counters ---
*4\r\n$6\r\nSETBIT\r\n$3\r\nk30\r\n$1\r\n7\r\n$1\r\n1\r\n
*3\r\n$6\r\nGETBIT\r\n$3\r\nk30\r\n$1\r\n7\r\n
*2\r\n$8\r\nBITCOUNT\r\n$3\r\nk30\r\n
# --- Server info ---
*1\r\n$4\r\nPING\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nECHO\r\n$5\r\nhello\r\n
*1\r\n$6\r\nDBSIZE\r\n
*2\r\n$4\r\nINFO\r\n$6\r\nclients\r\n
*1\r\n$6\r\nCLIENT\r\n
# --- Pipelines (two SETs in one frame) ---
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\np01\r\n$1\r\n1\r\n*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\np02\r\n$1\r\n2\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\np01\r\n*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\np02\r\n
# --- Binary-safe payloads ---
*3\r\n$3\r\nSET\r\n$3\r\nbin\r\n$4\r\n\x00\x01\x02\x03\r\n
*2\r\n$3\r\nGET\r\n$3\r\nbin\r\n
# --- Memcached ASCII (gated separately by the Rust harness) ---
get k01\r\n
get k02\r\n
set k01 0 0 5\r\nhello\r\n
set k02 0 0 5\r\nworld\r\n
add k03 0 0 3\r\nabc\r\n
replace k01 0 0 3\r\nXYZ\r\n
delete k02\r\n
incr counter 1\r\n
decr counter 1\r\n
gets k01\r\n
stats\r\n
version\r\n
quit\r\n
